name: Markray Corp.
summary: Markray Corp., a development stage mining company, operates a rare earth minerals mine in Russia. It primarily mines for gold, silver, platinum, and iron, as well as transparent iron-oxide pigment. The company was formerly known as R'Vibrant Inc. and changed its name to Markray Corp. in January 2011. Markray Corp. was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in North Hollywood, California.
